articles.description: Caf executive committee member Augustin Senghor says the decision to strip Senegal of the 2025 Afcon title is "unacceptable, abject and we have to denounce it".
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Senegal's title being handed to Morocco 'has to be denounced', says Caf executive

articles.description: With just two out of six Premier League teams progressing to the Champions League quarter-finals, what went wrong for the English sides?
articles.title: Champions League: What has gone wrong for Premier League teams in last 16?

articles.description: After Lionel Messi scored his 900th career goal on Wednesday, BBC Sport looks at the numbers behind the "insane" achievement.
articles.title: Lionel Messi: Argentine hits 900 career goals - numbers behind the milestone

articles.description: Reaction from the Champions League last-16, as Liverpool reach quarter-finals, Tottenham beaten by Atletico Madrid and Newcastle are hammered by Barcelona.
articles.title: Champions League LIVE: Quarter-final draw as Liverpool and Arsenal into last eight

articles.description: At 15, Manchester United's JJ Gabriel is too young to play in the Premier League but he is already showing clear signs he is a huge talent.
articles.title: Manchester United: JJ Gabriel - the latest Old Trafford prodigy, aged 15

articles.description: British sprinter Amy Hunt on inspiring female athletes to get university degrees as she prepares to compete at the World Athletics Indoor Championships.
articles.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: Amy Hunt on empowering female athletes

articles.description: When an 18-year-old makes Real Madrid history in a crucial Champions League tie against Manchester City, it inevitably draws acclaim and attention. BBC Sport takes a look at rising star Thiago Pitarch.
articles.title: Thiago Pitarch: Who is Real Madrid's latest wonderkid and record breaker?

articles.description: How much attention have you paid to what's happened in the world of sport over the past seven days?
articles.title: BBC Sport weekly quiz :Who is football's youngest top-flight scorer?

articles.description: Galatasaray midfielder Noa Lang is set to have surgery in Liverpool after suffering a "serious cut" at Anfield.
articles.title: Noa Lang: Galatasaray midfielder set for surgery on cut thumb after Champions League defeat by Liverpool

articles.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan produces a superb display to beat Shaun Murphy 5-3 and reach the quarter-finals of the World Open in Yushan.
articles.title: World Open: Ronnie O'Sullivan sees off Shaun Murphy to reach 150th ranking quarter-final
